# Add BibTeX entries safely

Goal:
- Add BibTeX entries to `elementos-pos-textuais/referencias.bib` and update citation keys in the LaTeX files if needed.

Rules:
- Never fabricate metadata.
- If metadata is incomplete, ask for: title, authors, year, venue/publisher, DOI/URL.
- Keep keys stable and consistent.

Output:
- New BibTeX entry/entries
- Any LaTeX files updated (if citation keys changed)
